when_to_use: Prepaid PIN-code payments for gaming and digital goods buyers
Skrill or Neteller wallet integration for online gambling platforms
Anonymous prepaid checkout for privacy-sensitive digital purchases

review.verdict: Specialist voucher and e-wallet rail for gaming and adult verticals, overkill for mainstream e-commerce.

review.not_for: Mainstream e-commerce where card and wallet rails already cover demand
